G

GAME_MUSIC - Static variable in class com.lulow.justtype.model.AudioClips
Background music during gameplay.
GameController - Class in com.lulow.justtype.controller
Controller for the main game screen.

Core game logic.

GameTimer - Class in com.lulow.justtype.model.timer
Countdown timer backed by a JavaFX Timeline.

Creates a new GameTimer with the given callbacks.
GameView - Class in com.lulow.justtype.view
Manages all visual output for the main game screen.
GameView(HBox, Label, Label, StackPane, AnchorPane, HBox) - Constructor for class com.lulow.justtype.view.GameView
Creates the game view, initializing the timer arc, background gradient, ash emitter, and the floating feedback label.
getCompletedLevels() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.model.GameLogic
Returns the number of levels completed so far.
getContainer() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.TimerArc
Returns the container group to be added to the scene graph.
getCurrentChars() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.model.GameLogic
Returns the characters of the current word.
getCurrentLevel() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.model.GameLogic
Returns the current level number.
getCurrentWord() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.model.GameLogic
Returns the current word as a string.
getInstance() - Static method in class com.lulow.justtype.model.AudioManager
Returns the singleton instance, creating it if necessary.
getInstance() - Static method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.SceneManager
Returns the singleton instance, creating it on first call.
getLastTimeRemaining() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.model.GameLogic
Returns the time remaining recorded at the end of the last level.
getMaxTimeForCurrentLevel() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.model.GameLogic
Returns the time limit for the current level.
getMaxTimeForLevel(int) - Static method in class com.lulow.justtype.model.LevelConfig
Calculates the time limit for a given level.
getRandomWord(int) - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.model.WordBank
Returns a word appropriate for the given level.
getRender() - Method in interface com.lulow.justtype.model.particles.IParticle
Returns the visual node representing this particle.
getRender() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.model.particles.ParticleAdapter
 
getSecondsLeft() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.model.timer.GameTimer
Returns the number of seconds remaining.
getSecondsLeft() - Method in interface com.lulow.justtype.model.timer.ITimer
Returns the remaining seconds.
getSecondsLeft() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.model.timer.TimerAdapter
 
getTierForLevel(int) - Static method in class com.lulow.justtype.model.LevelConfig
Returns the difficulty tier for a given level.
getWordDisplay() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.view.GameView
Returns the word display HBox, used when injecting it into result screens.
getYPos() - Method in interface com.lulow.justtype.model.particles.IParticle
Returns the vertical position of the particle.
getYPos() - Method in class com.lulow.justtype.model.particles.ParticleAdapter

Background gradient bottom color for the EASY tier.
